definition: Tracks price relative to active price-sentiment overlap bands and alert/event states.
interpretation_notes: 50 neutral; confirmed/watch events move score away from 50; fades with recency.

definition: Sentiment-enhanced MACD model combining classical price MACD and sentiment MACD relationship logic.
interpretation_notes: Raw price MACD stays public-comparable; relationship scores are SETA-specific.

definition: State/timing model using price RSI, sentiment RSI, their relationship and stochastic timing.
interpretation_notes: Separates direction/repair/exhaustion rather than one simplistic RSI score.

definition: Sentiment moving-average stack, slope and structure model.
interpretation_notes: Splits direction from structure so a ribbon can be bearish but clean, or bullish but unstable.

definition: Trend structure from price and sentiment moving average ladders.
interpretation_notes: Above 50 bullish stacking; below 50 bearish/mixed stacking.
Confirms or discounts directional setups without replacing pure signal scores.

definition: Combines families into direction, confidence, dispersion, archetypes and priority.
interpretation_notes: Priority is review urgency, not bullishness.
